title: Evangelion Rody Crossover
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Rody Crossover             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Wed Apr 11, 2012 9:09 am [url]http://kotaku.com/5900943/its-like-my-little-pony-but-with-evangelion/gallery/1[/url] First thought: "What in the world?" Second thought: "The only person more confused about this than me seems to be Rei."

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 11, 2012 10:16 am So that explains this -- http://forum.evageeks.org/post/519053/Fazmotrons-Japan-Eva-Trip/#519053

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Thu Apr 19, 2012 1:53 pm What in the world is...

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Apr 20, 2012 11:06 am Someone wrote: What in the world is...

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Fri Apr 20, 2012 7:17 pm Oh, Gainax merchandisers. You never cease to amaze me. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Mon May 28, 2012 4:27 am It would seem that the merchandise can only become stranger and stranger, take the Evangelion Bucket that the Eva Monkey posted for an example: [url]http://www.evamonkey.com/evangelion-nerv-bucket/[/url] Perhaps those that design the merchandise at Gainax and Khara have begun to run out of ideas for sensible, desirable items that actually have a proper purpose, rather than blow up balloon horses and buckets..... Are these Rody horses what sparked the Evangelion/My Little Pony fan art flood on the picture thread?
